name: browser-v2-bracket
description: Client-side single-elimination tournament bracket builder (vendored, debranded) served as static files.

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const h='index.html';if(!fs.existsSync(h))throw new Error('missing index.html entry point');if(fs.readFileSync(h,'utf8').length<200)throw new Error('index.html looks empty');console.log('build ok: static app')"
